{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block content %}

Import {% if import_type == 'vendors' %}Vendors{% else %}Notes{% endif %} from CSV

How to use:
{% if import_type == 'vendors' %}

Upload a CSV file with vendor data. Required columns: name, contact_email, phone

{% else %}

Upload a CSV file with notes data. Required columns: vendor, title, content

Note: The vendor must already exist in the system.

{% endif %}
Example CSV format: 
{% if import_type == 'vendors' %}name,contact_email,phone
ABC Corp,contact@abc.com,123-456-7890
XYZ Ltd,info@xyz.com,098-765-4321{% else %}vendor,title,content
ABC Corp,Meeting Notes,Discussed project timeline
XYZ Ltd,Contract Review,Terms need clarification{% endif %}
{% csrf_token %}
Select a CSV file to import
Where to store the uploaded file
{% endblock %}
